name: Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 stick pepperoni (remove skin, slice and quarter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach according to directions. Drain.
2. Beat the eggs and add them to the spinach. Mix in the remaining ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 9" x 13" pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes at 350 degrees.
